summary: Fixed review findings: added negative duration guard (Math.max(0, mins)), wrapped writeFileSync in try/catch for --output md mode, added costUsd type check before .toFixed(), sanitized error messages against ANSI injection, and added 10 new tests covering duration formatting, multiple gates, \r\n escaping, empty tasks, costUsd=0, _last_modified fallback, (no title) assertion, slash path traversal, and writeFileSync failure. All 61 report tests and 579 total tests pass.
